session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check code quality

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1673 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty --- All checks passed!
... [108 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
## fast-ci Results
**Status:** FAILED (Exit code 2)
The fast-ci target failed due to **Prettier formatting issues**. Here's the breakdown:
### Issues Found
**Prettier Check - Code style issues in 2 files:** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files need to be reformatted with Prettier (the error message suggests running `prettier --write` to fix).
### Passed Checks
- Ruff linting: PASSED (All checks passed!) - Type checking (ty): PASSED (All checks passed!) - Markdown checks: OK - Exec reference check: OK (up to date) - Unit tests (erk): 5917 passed in 12.44s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.37s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.78s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed (indicated by dot count)
### Summary
The test suite itself passed completely, but the CI pipeline failed due to code formatting issues in two markdown documentation files that don't conform to Prettier standards.
